category_sources: source_facts.description says shc is a Shell Script Compiler.
source_facts.executables lists shc as the command-line executable.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official shc site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official shc project site.
source_facts.repo identifies the official GitHub repository whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
